title: Schmanguage Fabric Mod
description: A minecraft fabric mod that automatically translates everything to schmanguage
body:
![SCHMANGUAGE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nil6AB6l/images/172d01f18b753fe008f90cd6f26b523ed23d0d22.png)

**Schmanguage is a minecraft fabric mod that translates all texts to the joke language with the same name**

To enable this mod go to Options... => Language... and select Schmenglish (Schmanguage)
If some texts are still not translated, try restarting your Minecraft client

---

In this language almost all words start with a "schm" prefix and replace all consonants until, but not including, the first vowel.
Example:
 - ~~L~~<u>a</u>nguage → **Schm**<u>a</u>nguage
 - ~~R~~<u>e</u>source pack → **Schm**<u>e</u>source pack

## Literal Text
All literal text, such as credits or chat messages, gets automatically translated.

## Translatable text
This mod incorporates [the Schmanguage resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/schmanguage-resource-pack). Any translatable texts lacking a specific translation will also be automatically translated to Schmanguage.

## Idea

The main idea is from the german YouTuber "[Halbzwilling](https://youtube.com/@halbzwilling)"... aka. Noah aka. Schmuu aka. Schmoah aka. Halbdrilling aka. Mapmaking aka. DerDerPaintNieFertigMacht aka. Unnoahmal
